results.title: Katalyst's New Ownership – KATALYST
results.content:
I want to start by acknowledging that Katalyst has faced significant challenges. Many customers have been left waiting, communication has broken down, and trust has been eroded.  I hear you and I am here to change your experience.

I have already rehired several former Katalyst employees and I am excited and determined to bring Katalyst back stronger than ever. Together we are focused on restoring your trust, delivering on promises that were made, and building a better future.

That starts with meeting commitments to our current customers, and we intend to honor and fulfill all existing orders. [...] We will share more information via email and on the Katalyst website and social media channels in the coming weeks. In the meantime, I appreciate and share your love for Katalyst and thank you for your patience as we start this journey.

With respect and determination,

Brendan Kennedy

results.title: Katalyst is rated "Average" with 3 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
The company I work for was in the process of onboarding some of our services with KatalystOS. Our representative, Nicole, was scatterbrained and inconsistent. There were large gaps in her communication with us, ranging from a few days to full weeks, just to be met with excuses from her such as "you know how the restaurant industry can be!" The communication between her and our other representative, John, was pretty much nonexistent. We filled out every form that Nicole sent over, and sent them to John as she instructed, only for her to circle back after days/weeks of silence to tell us yet again that we had not filled out the form. This happened several times, to the point where we were fed up. The straw that broke the camel's back was when we received an invoice from John where we were [...] Jul 9, 2024

Image 31: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## Made promises they could not deliver on.
I signed up with this company after meeting them at a food show. They claimed to be so much better than the competition and especially better then what I was using. Made lots of promises about seemless migration of our systems and other cool features. They delivered none of this. 

When it became clear Katalyst could not deliver I made the decision to revert back to our old system. The Katalyst platform was slow and clunky with way to many steps to create a transaction. Each transaction took about 45 seconds longer then our current system. This may not seem like a big deal but when doing 400-500 transactions a day it adds up. [...] We really thought that Katalyst was the solution we needed to have a catering website and to manage our catering orders in one place. There definitely was a rush to get this account going and for us to sign up the account, but then after, the lack of attention to detail and lack of customer support was evident. We were assigned a customer support rep to handle everything we need and to support us throughout this process.

To say the least, many emails were unanswered for weeks, then when we would get responses, not all issues were addressed and we would have to continue to email. We even got to the point of offering suggestions on how she should be more effIcient when responding to emails.

results.title: Katalyst
results.content:
### Tools

### Support

# katalyst

## What is Katalyst?

Katalyst is SHSU’s central technology request system—a self-service portal where faculty, staff, and students can submit IT-related issues, request services, and track the status of their tickets. Think of it as the university’s digital help desk, designed to streamline how tech support is requested and delivered.  
  
Katalyst allows users to:  
  
1. Submit requests for help with software, hardware, accounts, or other tech needs.  
2. Report issues when something isn’t working (e.g., broken equipment, login problems).  
3. Track progress on submitted tickets in real time.  
4. Access a knowledge base with articles and tutorials for common problems.  
5. Use a chatbot for quick answers without needing to call or email.
